test.command: npm run type-check && npm run build

blockingIssues.description: src/lib/supabase/server.ts getSessionUser() returns only the users-table profile row instead of combined auth user + profile required by feature contract.
src/middleware.ts unauthorizedResponse() returns fresh JSON/redirect responses without preserving updateSession cookies/headers from supabaseResponse.
src/middleware.ts no-role onboarding branches return new responses instead of returning supabaseResponse or copying its cookies first.
src/middleware.ts role-mismatch API branches return new 401 responses without propagating updateSession cookies/headers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update fullstack-worker validation guidance to allow milestone-defined staged exceptions when feature contracts explicitly permit temporary typecheck/build failures in intermediate infrastructure steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both infra-supabase-ssr-setup and infra-middleware-rewrite reviews flagged mismatch between strict SKILL.md Step 4 and milestone contracts that permit intermediate failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to provide explicit evidence when claiming skill procedure compliance (or have reviewers mark mismatch automatically) when mandatory context reads are not present in transcript skeletons.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: infra-api-route-migration review found handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true while transcript skeleton lacked reads of architecture.md and supabase-ssr-nextjs.md mandated by fullstack-worker Step 1.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether migration features may include tightly-scoped behavior fixes when contracts also say 'preserve business logic exactly' to avoid ambiguous review outcomes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: infra-api-route-migration review noted intentional role literal fixes ('business_owner' -> 'owner') across 5 routes that improved correctness but exceeded pure import-swap scope.

rejectedObservations.observation: fullstack-worker strict validation gate conflicts with staged milestone contracts
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate across two review reports; consolidated into one suggested guidance update
